name: ACN — Framework di Autenticazione per la Posta Elettronica (Italy)
description: Agenzia per la Cybersicurezza Nazionale email-authentication framework. Maximum-security posture: SPF -all, DMARC p=reject with sp=reject and strict alignment (adkim=s; aspf=s), aggregate AND forensic reporting (rua + ruf). Note the ruf requirement conflicts with BSI TR-03182 (GDPR) — this is intentional and profile-scoped.
attestation_only: Sending server configured to sign with DKIM
Receiving server configured to verify SPF/DKIM and apply DMARC policy
